article.title: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
article.summary: Dealing with large post quantum signatures slowing down Bitcoin can be solved with bigger blocks, or aggregating signatures using STARK proofs.

headline: HK Regulator Demands Anti-Phishing Measures for Crypto Exchanges

article.title: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
article.summary: Hong Kong’s regulator has ordered crypto platforms and online brokers to meet newly issued phishing-resistant login requirements within the next 12 months.

headline: EQT, Advent Eye $10B Qiagen Takeover Bid

article.title: Qiagen Draws Early Takeover Interest From EQT, Advent
article.summary: Qiagen NV, the European molecular testing company, is drawing early takeover interest from firms including EQT AB and Advent, people familiar with the matter said.

headline: AZN Shares Plummet 12% on Trial Failure

article.title: AstraZeneca's Rare Drug Trial Failure Sends Shares Plunging
article.summary: AstraZeneca Plc's shares dropped more than 10% after a trial of a new heart drug failed to help prevent heart problems in patients with a rare disease. Bloomberg Intelligence's Sam Fazeli has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: MoonPay Launches 100K AI Crypto Bots on Telegram

article.title: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
article.summary: MoonAgents lets users analyze markets and prepare crypto transactions through Telegram while keeping keys on their own devices.

headline: HK SFC Bans OTP Logins for Crypto Platforms

article.title: Hong Kong SFC orders crypto platforms, online brokers to phase out OTP logins
article.summary: Hong Kong SFC orders internet brokers, crypto platforms to replace OTP logins with passkeys within 12 months following 57% spoofing surge.

headline: PayPal Boosts $1B PYUSD on Polygon Network

article.title: PayPal seeks to increase use of PYUSD stablecoin with native issuance on Polygon
article.summary: The company said its stablecoin will now be issued natively on Polygon, in addition to becoming available through Polygon's Open Money Stack.

headline: Iran Unrest Sparks $2B Oil Sell-Off Amid Turmoil

article.summary: Ali Khamenei’s funeral leaves son Mojtaba — about whom Iranians know little — to confront enormous challenges facing the regime
